title: Apugli
description: A library for Apoli/Origins for use with certain mods/datapacks.
body:
### Apugli is no longer supported. Most of its important features should be merged into Apoli post 1.20.1. You will not be getting any support if you want to use the mod. You're on your own if you want to use it, here be dragons, shoo! --- ### [Requires Apoli](https://github.com/apace100/apoli/releases) This power library contains new power types, conditions and actions for Origins/Apoli datapack making.
### Q: What is Apoli and its relation to Apugli? Apoli is the library mod Origins (for 1.17 and above) uses for its powers, conditions and actions. Apugli should work right out the bat with any mod that has Apoli or Apoli by itself. The 1.16.5 versions are meant for Origins 0.7.3 ### Q: Why does my game crash with Origins Power Expansion (OPE)? Origins Power Expansion is a discontinued mod. All of its content has been ported to Apugli, any OPE dependent datapacks should work right out the bat. In other words, Apugli is a continuation of OPE. ### Q: Do I have this mod if I have TooManyOrigins or CursedOrigins This mod is built into TooManyOrigins or CursedOrigins if: TooManyOrigins (Fabric) - 0.1.3a or later TooManyOrigins (Forge 1.16.5) - 0.5.1.1-0.5.1.2 | Unsupported TooManyOrigins (Forge 1.19.2 and above) - 0.8.0 or later CursedOrigins - 2.0.0 or later | Unsupported
